description: Baseline continuous integration and delivery requirements ensuring code quality gates are enforced automatically before merge.

requirements.text: Automated test suite runs on every pull request and merge to main is blocked when tests fail
requirements.intent: Regressions must be caught before they reach the default branch
requirements.verifiable_by: Open PR with a failing test; confirm CI blocks merge

requirements.text: Linting and formatting checks run in CI and block merge on violations
requirements.intent: Code style must be enforced automatically, not through review comments
requirements.verifiable_by: Open PR with a linting violation; confirm CI blocks merge

requirements.text: Type checking (if applicable to the language) runs in CI and blocks merge on type errors
requirements.intent: Type safety must be enforced at the pipeline level, not just the IDE
requirements.verifiable_by: Introduce a type error; confirm CI catches it and blocks merge

requirements.text: Build artifacts are produced from a clean CI environment, not from developer machines
requirements.intent: Deployable artifacts must be reproducible and untainted by local state
requirements.verifiable_by: Confirm deployment pipeline pulls from CI artifacts, not local builds
